shared_properties: Decoy frames use 160x160 px cells and preserve the same centerline used by the main projectile atlas.
Opacity bands stay readable over the dark hall background without replacing the main element palette.
differences: This asset adds eight frames for fake-warning and curved-flight telegraphs used in advanced academy duels.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Curve projectile rule, fake telegraph cadence, and advanced duel pacing grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Decoy readability against the hall lighting and lane glow grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with eight frames and apply the asset to a warning-trail entity that moves on a sine-path Transform system.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/decoy_curve_projectile_sheet.png through AssetServer and keep the handle in the projectile art table.
runtime_notes: Animate at 10 fps with loop enabled for the feint travel phase.
Use the same spawn origin as elemental_projectile_state_sheet so collision checks stay aligned.
Apply additive blend to the outer ring while leaving the core sprite alpha-clipped.

context.role: Advanced telegraph and feint projectile art for fake warnings and curved flight.
context.usage: Spawned during grade-4 and higher duels when fake warnings or curve patterns are active.

deliverables.notes: Eight-frame atlas for fake-warning and curve-path telegraphs.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 640x320 px with eight 160x160 frames arranged as 4 columns by 2 rows.
Outer warning ring thickness stays between 8 px and 12 px in every frame.
Core trail never exceeds a 96 px diameter circle, leaving transparent buffer for curve motion readability.
